name: Channel-Based Identity Transplant

v1_direct_decode.method: Decode modified intermediate latent directly through VAE (flawed)

v2_redenoising.method: Callback injection: swap channel at step N, let UNet continue denoising

key_finding: UNet heals single-channel swaps. V2 SSIM 0.67-0.90 to target — swapped images nearly identical to unmodified. Channel displacement ordering (Ch0>Ch3>Ch1≈Ch2) matches zeroing results.
